name: Black Bean and Millet Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the millet in 3 cups of water until all water is absorbed (30-45 minutes). Fluff with a fork and allow to cool slightly.
2. In a very large bowl, combine millet, black beans, tomatoes, and onion.
3. Peel several strips from the cucumber and cut it lengthwise into four pieces. Remove the seedy part from each piece and cut them into 1/2 inch slices.
4. Add the cucumber to the salad.
5. In a separate small bowl, mix together:
- 1/3 cup Water
- 3 tablespoons Lemon juice
- 2 teaspoons Balsamic vinegar
- 1 teaspoon Garlic, minced
- 1 teaspoon Salt
- 1/4 teaspoon Allspice
- 1/4 teaspoon Black pepper
- 1/2 teaspoon Cumin
6. Pour the dressing over the salad and toss to combine.
7. Cover and refrigerate until the salad is very well chilled.
8. Serve on lettuce leaves or stuff into pita breads.
